case_title: WILLIAM OSWALD et al VS. OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY,AKA TITLE INSURANCE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-14-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE BREACH OF CONTRACT; BREACH OF THE COVENANTS OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING; FRAUD-INTENTIONAL MISREPRESENTATION; VIOLATION OF CAL.B&P CODE 17200
